title: LENTS COMMUNITY WELLNESS FAIR - 211info
text: LENTS COMMUNITY WELLNESS FAIR LENTS COMMUNITY WELLNESS FAIR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hot meal and showers; navigation services for housing, shelter, OHP, and SNAP; ID replacement and payment assistance; referrals for detox services, overdose prevention, and Narcan supplies. 4244 SE 91st Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday 11am-1pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of SE 91st Avenue and SE Cora Street. TriMet bus line 9 and MAX Green Line stop at Holgate Boulevard. Services: Certificates/Forms Assistance Community Meals Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention Opioid Antidote Distribution Resource and Service Fairs Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
